system.Text:
__When you search in a community, physical or digital, to find an asset, service, or someone interested in what you offer__, envision your approach and roll. If you...
* Bargain across potential traders: Roll +heart
* Assess the offers: Roll +wits

If you are performing the search in a dense and technologically advanced population, add +1. If you share a bond, add another +1.

On a __strong hit__, you find what you are looking for at a fair deal. If you...
*  @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} now, add +2
*  @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fuvuC83AP3ktMMVP]{Exchange Wealth}, you have access to upmarket assets and services

On a __weak hit__, the search did not go as well as expected. If you...
*  @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} now, add +1
*  @Compendium[ancient-wonders.ancientwondersmoves.Item.fuvuC83AP3ktMMVP]{Exchange Wealth}, you have access to upmarket assets and services but with some extra time; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1).

On a __miss__, you are out of luck; what you're looking for is not available and the situation worsens. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
